# Platinum Construction Corporation

> Commercial general contractor based in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada, delivering design-build, franchise rollouts, hospitality, retail, kitchens and custom residential projects across Canada and the United States since 1997.

Platinum Construction Corporation has 27+ years of experience as a turnkey general contractor. The firm operates from offices in Ontario (Canada) and a US branch, serving national franchise brands and developers across North America.

## Services

- Commercial construction and renovations
- Franchise and retail rollouts (Starbucks, Chipotle, Tim Hortons, Wendy's, KFC, A&W, Mr. Mikes, Panera Bread, Dairy Queen, Pur & Simple, Firehouse Subs, Noodles & Company)
- Hospitality and restaurants
- Salon studios (Sola Salon)
- Custom residential and design-build
- Project management
- Environmental and sustainable construction

## Pages

- [Home](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/): Company overview, hero of recent builds, services teaser
- [About](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/about): Company history, philosophy, leadership, 27-year track record
- [Services](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/services): Detailed service offerings and the design-build process
- [Gallery](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/gallery): Portfolio of completed projects with photos, filterable by category
- [Virtual Tours](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/virtual-tours): 360° immersive tours of 15 completed builds
- [Environmental Policy](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/environmental-policy): Commitments to sustainable, energy-efficient construction
- [Contact](https://platinum-site.vercel.app/contact): Phone, email, Ontario office, US branch
